programme.sub-title: S04 : E06 Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: Dr. G must figure out if a man died as a result of his infected stab wound or if drug abuse was the culprit.

programme.title: The Shamrock Spitfire
programme.desc: Tositarina irlantilaisesta hävittäjälentäjä Brendan ”Paddy” Finucanesta, josta vain 21-vuotiaana tuli Royal Air Forcen nuorin laivueenkomentaja ja yksi toisen maailmansodan suurimmista ja palkituimmista hävittäjä-ässistä.

programme.title: In Tranzit
programme.desc: Toisen maailmansodan päätyttyä joukko saksalaisia sotavankeja lähetetään leningradilaiselle vankileirille. Leirin naistyöntekijät vihaavat heidän miehensä ja poikansa tappaneita saksalaisia yli kaiken ja valmistautuvat nyt kostoon.

programme.title: The Shack
programme.desc: Menestysromaaniin perustuva The Shack vie meidät isän kiehtovalle henkiselle matkalle. Perhetragediasta selviytynyt Mack Phillips vajoaa syvään masennukseen ja alkaa epäillä vakaimpia uskomuksiaan. Kesken uskonkriisin hän saa salaperäisen kirjeen, joka johdattaa hänet hylättyyn majaan kaukana erämaassa. Majalla hän tapaa kolme ventovierasta ihmistä, joita johtaa nainen. Tämän kohtaamisen kautta Mack löytää tärkeitä totuuksia, jotka mullistavat hänen käsityksensä kokemastaan tragediasta ja muuttavat hänen elämänsä lopullisesti.

programme.title: The Company Men
programme.desc: Bobby Walkerilla on unelmatyö, kuvankaunis perhe ja säihkyvä uusi Porsche autotallissa. Irtisanomiset ajavat Bobbyn ja hänen ystävänsä kadulle, jolloin heidän pitää määritellä itsensä uudestaan ihmisinä, aviomiehinä ja isinä. Ehkä se, jota Bobby joskus kutsui "työelämäksi", muuttuu pian oikeaksi elämäksi?

programme.title: Sommersby
programme.desc: Richard Gere ja Oscar-voittaja Jodie Foster tähdittävät romanttista tarinaa miehestä, joka palaa Amerikan sisällissodasta muuttuneena miehenä. Seitsemän vuotta on kulunut siitä, kun Jack Sommersby (Gere) lähti sotaan, joka on päättynyt jo kaksi vuotta sitten. Hänen vaimonsa Laurel (Foster) on jäänyt heidän maatilalleen ja on nyt kihloissa. Sommersbyn palatessa hän päättää kihlauksensa välittömästi jatkaakseen suhdetta aviomieheensä, joka oli aiemmin väkivaltainen, mutta nyt kiltti, hellä ja menestyvä. Sommersby ja hänen vaimonsa jakavat kuitenkin miehen menneisyydestä salaisuuden, joka paljastuessaan järkyttää koko yhteisöä.

programme.title: Beatrix Potter
programme.desc: Hän on ihastuttanut monia sukupolvia, mutta hänen elämänsä on ollut salaisuus. Tähän saakka. Beatrix Potter on 30-vuotias sinkkunainen aikana, jolloin naisen kunnioitettavin tehtävä on mennä hyviin naimisiin. Kukaan, ei edes Beatrixin oma perhe, ymmärrä sitä, että Beatrix haluaa mieluummin piirtää ja kertoa tarinoita eläimistä. Kaikki menee pieleen, kun Beatrix tapaa kokemattoman kustantajan Norman Waynen, joka rakastuu korviaan myöten niin Beatrixin ainutlaatuisiin tarinoihin kuin itse Beatrixiinkin. Beatrix joutuu mahdottomaan tilanteeseen, jossa hänen pitää irrottautua perheen tukahduttavasta otteesta.

programme.title: Viimeinen vuoro
programme.desc: Tom Harper (Timothy Spall) lähtee pitkälle bussimatkalle Skotlannin pohjoisimmasta kolkasta synnyinseuduilleen Englannin etelärannikon Lands Endiin. Paikallisbussien aikatauluja, omaa ikäänsä ja kohtaloa uhmaten hän tekee kaikkensa pitääkseen vaimolleen antamansa lupauksen. Matkasta tulee muistorikas seikkailuretki täynnä käänteitä ja yllätyksiä. VIIMEINEN VUORO on elokuva rakkaudesta, menetyksestä ja ihmisen luonteikkaasta periksiantamattomuudesta.

programme.title: Mrs Henderson Presents
programme.desc: Laura Henderson ostaa vanhan lontoolaisen teatterin ja avaa sen Windmill-nimisenä esityssalina, joka jää historiaan muun muassa täysin alastonrevyyjensä ansiosta.

programme.title: Night Train to Lisbon
programme.desc: Sveitsiläinen professori Raimund Gregorius hylkää luennot ja tiukan elämän lähteäkseen jännittävälle seikkailulle, joka vie hänet matkalle oman sisimpänsä syvyyksiin.

programme.title: Griffin & Phoenix
programme.desc: Kun Griffin saa kuulla, että hänellä on kuolemaan johtava sairaus, hän päättää ottaa kohtalonsa omiin käsiinsä ja elää täysillä loppuun asti. Hän tapaa Phoenixin ja aikaa myöten rakastuu tähän, mutta myös Phoenixilla on salaisuus...

programme.title: Detroit
programme.desc: Elokuvien The Hurt Locker ja Zero Dark Thirty Oscar®-palkittu ohjaaja tarjoilee otteessaan pitävän, riipaisevan tarinan Yhdysvaltain rotumellakoiden synkimmistä hetkistä, jotka ravistelivat Detroitia kesällä 1967.

programme.title: Papillon
programme.desc: Guayanaan suorittamaan tuomionsa työleirillä. Papillon on päättänyt paeta, joten hän solmii erikoisen ystävyyden hauraan, mutta pahamaineisen väärentäjä Louis Degan (Dustin Hoffman) kanssa, joka vastahakoisesti liittyy mukaan. Ankarasta eristyksestä, karuista oloista ja jatkuvasta paljastumisen uhasta huolimatta Papillon johtaa epätoivoista pakoyritystä.

programme.title: Danny Collins
programme.desc: Al Pacino esittää ikääntyvää 1970-luvun rokkaria Danny Collinsia, joka ei osaa luopua rankasta elämäntyylistään. Kun hänen managerinsa löytää John Lennonin toimittamatta jääneen kirjeen Collinsille neljänkymmenen vuoden takaa, Collins päättää muuttaa elämänsä ja lähtee riipaisevalle matkalle etsimään perhettään, rakkautta ja uutta mahdollisuutta. Elokuvan upean soundtrackin helminä kuullaan John Lennonin lauluja.

programme.title: Mothers and Daughters
programme.desc: Korkealla Manhattanin yläpuolella trendikäs ja onnellinen sinkkutyttö Rigby Gray kurkistelee naapureiden asuntoihin ja elämään. Hän piileskelee turvallisesti kameran pitkän linssin takana eikä tiedä, että hänen elämänsä on muuttumassa lopullisesti. Rigbyn otokset muiden elämästä heräävät eloon risteävissä tarinoissa, joissa äiti-lapsisuhteet esiintyvät kaikissa muodoissaan. Huomaamme, että siskot ja tuntemattomat, kämppikset ja rakastajat, jopa painajaismaiset anopit voivat olla mitä rakastettavimpia äitihahmoja.

programme.title: The Duchess
programme.desc: Kronikka 1700-luvun aristokraatin, Devonshiren herttuattaren Georgianan, elämästä. Häntä kunnioitettiin hänen ylellisestä poliittisesta ja henkilökohtaisesta elämästään.

programme.title: Laitakaupungin valot
programme.desc: Laitakaupungin valot kertoo yövartijana työskentelevästä Koistisesta, joka joutuu petoksen uhriksi. Laitakaupungin valot oli mukana vuoden 2006 Cannesin elokuvajuhlien kansainvälisessä kilpasarjassa. Elokuva palkittiin parhaan elokuvan Jussi-palkinnolla vuonna 2007. Lisäksi Timo Salminen voitti Jussin parhaasta kuvauksesta ja Markku Pätilä parhaasta lavastuksesta.

programme.title: To The Wonder
programme.desc: Nuori kirjailija Neil on särkenyt sydämensä Ranskassa ja hän kääntyy uuden valittunsa puoleen kotikylässään Oklahomassa. Välimeren romanssi hiipuu, eikä Neil osaa valita eurooppalaisen rakkaansa, tai menneisyyden ihastuksen väliltä. Neil ei ole ainoa joka ei osaa valita. Rakkaus on jälleenmuuttamassa tai tuhoamassa viattomien ihmisten elämän ikiajoiksi.

programme.title: From Time to Time
programme.desc: Kummittava aavetarina, joka kattaa kaksi maailmaa, yli vuosisadan erolla. Kun 13-vuotias Tolly saa selville, että hän voi salaperäisesti matkustaa näiden kahden välillä, hän aloittaa seikkailun, joka paljastaa sukupolvien ajan haudatut perheen salaisuudet.

programme.title: Night Train to Lisbon
programme.desc: Sveitsiläinen professori Raimund Gregorius hylkää luennot ja tiukan elämän lähteäkseen jännittävälle seikkailulle, joka vie hänet matkalle oman sisimpänsä syvyyksiin.

programme.title: Viimeinen vuoro
programme.desc: Tom Harper (Timothy Spall) lähtee pitkälle bussimatkalle Skotlannin pohjoisimmasta kolkasta synnyinseuduilleen Englannin etelärannikon Lands Endiin. Paikallisbussien aikatauluja, omaa ikäänsä ja kohtaloa uhmaten hän tekee kaikkensa pitääkseen vaimolleen antamansa lupauksen. Matkasta tulee muistorikas seikkailuretki täynnä käänteitä ja yllätyksiä. VIIMEINEN VUORO on elokuva rakkaudesta, menetyksestä ja ihmisen luonteikkaasta periksiantamattomuudesta.

programme.title: Conviction
programme.desc: Bettyn veli tuomitaan murhasta, jolloin alkaa 18 vuoden taistelu järjestelmää vastaan. Betty uskoo veljensä syyttömyyteen, joten hän alkaa opiskella oikeustiedettä voidakseen puolustaa veljeään oikeudessa!

programme.title: Paluu Yorkshireen
programme.desc: Arthur Morrison (Jim Broadbent) saa tietää, että hänellä on syöpä ja vain muutama viikko aikaa elää. Hänen vanhin poikansa Blake (Oscar-voittaja* Colin Firth) muuttaa Yorkshireen äitinsä luokse, kylään jossa hän syntyi. Kun Arthurin tila heikkenee, Blake puntaroi suhdettaan isäänsä. Hän muistaa yhteiset hetket, heidän läheisyytensä ja heidän erimielisyytensä. Kun isä kuolee, Blake alkaa muistella heidän välistä sidettä – ristiriitoja, turhautumisia, rakkautta ja menetyksiä, jotka kaikki kuuluvat monimutkaiseen suhteeseen isän ja pojan välillä.

programme.title: Laitakaupungin valot
programme.desc: Laitakaupungin valot kertoo yövartijana työskentelevästä Koistisesta, joka joutuu petoksen uhriksi. Laitakaupungin valot oli mukana vuoden 2006 Cannesin elokuvajuhlien kansainvälisessä kilpasarjassa. Elokuva palkittiin parhaan elokuvan Jussi-palkinnolla vuonna 2007. Lisäksi Timo Salminen voitti Jussin parhaasta kuvauksesta ja Markku Pätilä parhaasta lavastuksesta.

programme.title: The Architect
programme.desc: Arkkitehti Leo Watersin avioliitto säröilee. Hänen vaimonsa Julia ei ole onnellinen, ja heidän poikansa Martin jättää opiskelut kesken ja palaa kotiinsa eksyneenä, eikä oikein onnistu löytämään yhteistä säveltä Leon kanssa. Christinatyttärellä on murrosikä käynnissä kaikkine vartalossa ja tunteissa tapahtuvine muutoksineen. Kuvaan astuu Tonya Neely, poliittinen aktivisti joka asuu Leon monta vuotta sitten suunnittelemassa kerrostalossa.

programme.title: Detroit
programme.desc: Elokuvien The Hurt Locker ja Zero Dark Thirty Oscar®-palkittu ohjaaja tarjoilee otteessaan pitävän, riipaisevan tarinan Yhdysvaltain rotumellakoiden synkimmistä hetkistä, jotka ravistelivat Detroitia kesällä 1967.

programme.title: Danny Collins
programme.desc: Al Pacino esittää ikääntyvää 1970-luvun rokkaria Danny Collinsia, joka ei osaa luopua rankasta elämäntyylistään. Kun hänen managerinsa löytää John Lennonin toimittamatta jääneen kirjeen Collinsille neljänkymmenen vuoden takaa, Collins päättää muuttaa elämänsä ja lähtee riipaisevalle matkalle etsimään perhettään, rakkautta ja uutta mahdollisuutta. Elokuvan upean soundtrackin helminä kuullaan John Lennonin lauluja.

programme.title: Brain On Fire
programme.desc: Susannah Cahalan on hiljattain valmistunut yliopistosta ja elää unelmaelämää New Yorkissa. Hän on lupaava toimittaja New York Postin toimituksessa ja rakastunut muusikko Stepheniin. Lisäksi esimies on antanut hänelle toimeksiannon, joka mahdollistaa uran läpilyönnin, joten kaikki on kohdallaan. Pian asiat alkavat kuitenkin luisua käsistä. Susannah sairastuu sitkeään flunssaan, unohtaa asioita ja myöhästyy aikatauluistaan. Hän kuulee ihmisten puhuvan selkänsä takana, on varma, että Stephen tapailee toista naista eikä pysty hallitsemaan kehoaan. Ja tilanne pahenee; Susannah alkaa saada voimakkaita kohtauksia ja hänen yhä psykoottisemmaksi käyvä käytöksensä vaatii jatkuvaa valvontaa.

programme.title: Andromeda

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Löydetään kristalli, joka voi palauttaa Andromedan voiman, mutta saadakseen sen Dylanin on työskenneltävä kaivoksen omistajalle.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Seefrasta löydetään tunneleita, joiden kautta voi päästä kahdeksalle muulle Seefra-planeetalle.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Kun vanha mies tapetaan, Beka, Rhade ja Harper ovat pää epäiltyjä ja joutuvat oikeuteen.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan saa selville, että Bekan poikaystävä oli oikeasti Drago Musevini, ja hän käytti Bekan DNA:ta luodakseen nietzscheläiset.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Beka ja Rhade joutuvat koetukselle, joka joko antaa heille suuren rikkauden tai ajaa heidät hulluuteen.

programme.title: Andromeda

programme.title: Andromeda

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Kun Dylan loukkaantuu vakavasti laboratoriossa tapahtuneessa räjähdyksessä, hän matkustaa erilaisten vaihtoehtoisten todellisuuksien läpi.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Rommie rakennetaan uudelleen auttamaan Seefra-järjestelmän evakuoinnissa.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Sotapäällikkö vakuuttaa seuraajilleen, että ulkoplaneettojen lähestyvä tuho on juoni, jonka tarkoituksena on helpottaa heidän planeettansa ryöstämistä.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan, Rhade ja Beka työskentelevät yhdessä pelastaakseen Trancen Methus-2:lta ja Harperin kenraali Burmalta.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Viimeinen taistelu New Systems -kansainyhteisön pelastamiseksi alkaa.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan suojelee Andromedaa palkkasotureilta, kun taas Beka alkaa miettiä, taistelevatko he väärällä puolella.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan löytää avaruusaseman, joka on täynnä lapsia, jotka uskovat, että hänen tehtävänään on tuoda rauha tappamalla heidän vihollisensa.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Andromeda sekaantuu Than-planeetan ja nietzscheläisen siirtokunnan väliseen riitaan.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Hätäkutsuun vastaaminen johtaa miehistön hakemaan Bekan veljen, joka on nykyään Wayist, ja hänen ystävänsä.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Mustan aukon ansiosta Dylan voi kommunikoida entisen morsiamensa kanssa 300 vuotta taaksepäin.

programme.desc: Dylan on vangittuna vankiplaneetalla, ja hänen on järjestettävä pako, kun hänen miehistönsä yrittää järjestää oman pelastuksensa.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Beka saa tietää, että hänen isänsä entinen liikekumppani myy erittäin riippuvuutta aiheuttavaa huumetta.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Andromeda löytää sisaraluksensa Pax Magellanicin. Paxin miehistö on 300 vuotta vanha... mutta ei ole ikääntynyt päivässä.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Tyr syöksyy Eureka Maru -aluksella maahan Nietzscheanin planeetalla ja menettää muistinsa.

programme.title: Andromeda

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Andromedaan nousee Consensus of Partsin, myyttisen mekaanisen yhteiskunnan, lennokki. Aluksi drone on ystävällinen, mutta yrittää pakottaa aluksen liittymään Konsensukseen.

programme.title: Andromeda

programme.desc: Dylan ja pastori Bem auttavat rauhanomaista yhteiskuntaa vastustamaan mahdollisia orjakauppiaita, mutta heidän on oltava varovaisia.

programme.desc: Dylan yrittää tuoda rauhaa kahteen eri Nietzschean ylpeyteen saattamalla toisen prinsessan järjestettyyn avioliittoon toisen prinssin kanssa.

programme.desc: Beka vie Andromedan Tarn-Vedraan, mutta pitkä aika liukuvirrassa aiheuttaa sivuvaikutuksia. Niiden torjumiseksi Beka alkaa käyttää Flashia ja jää pian koukkuun.

programme.title: Andromeda

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylanin ja Rommien on pelastettava Tyr, Harper ja Rev Magogin maailmalaivalta.

programme.desc: Miehistö etsii kauan kadoksissa ollutta kansainyhteisön johtajaa, joka on mennyt piiloon.

programme.desc: Dylan ja hänen uusi Kansainyhteisön laivastonsa ottavat vastaan Drago-Kazovin laivaston, mutta huomaavat sen olevan paljon odotettua suurempi.

programme.desc: Luomisen moottori pystyy kirjoittamaan maailmankaikkeuden uudelleen omistajan toiveiden mukaisesti.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: It was one of the most unusual cases in forensic history. Investigators had to find a way to solve a murder case with evidence which consisted of a squashed tomato found at the crime scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a dedicated, well-respected teacher disappeared, police had to determine if she'd gone on vacation without telling anyone, or if she was the victim of foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Seattle police had no suspects in the violent murder of post-grunge singer, Mia Zapata. More than a decade passed before the evidence could be used by forensic scientists to identify the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A Michigan State University grad student disappeared and was presumed dead. With the help of a professor of geological sciences, police hoped to get the "dirt" on her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A man's wife took her own life and his college sweetheart killed herself the same way. Was it coincidence?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman was shot to death in her Connecticut driveway. Now police must determine if love had turned deadly.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The victim had been sexually assaulted and stabbed to death on the beach. A pair of men's tennis shoes was discovered near her body.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A 13-year-old girl went missing from her Colorado home and the only evidence the kidnapper left behind was three fingerprints on a window screen.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A brutal murder, lots of suspects and conflicting evidence but the forensics were clear on one thing: The killer knew his victim. And that alone gave investigators a head start.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A serial killer was on the loose and police had to find him before he struck again. Their most promising lead was an unusual one: a bloody fingerprint on the body of one of the victims.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: On Halloween night 2004, Adriane Insogna and Leslie Mazzara were brutally murdered in their Napa home.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After the suspect was convicted of murder, he maintained his innocence through his 25 years in prison.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman was brutally murdered in her home and the only witnesses to the crime were the family dogs. An expert in canine behavior was convinced the killer knew both the victim and the animals.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The killer probably hoped to cover his tracks by staging the crime scene. But investigators saw through the attempt almost immediately.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A six-year-old girl ran and hid when she saw her grandmother being beaten to death, but the man followed, beat and assaulted her. She said the assailant was her uncle, who was convicted.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The body of a college co-ed was found on a farm covered with her own denim as well as the jeans of the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The body of an attractive young woman was found a mile from her abandoned car. Police were especially concerned when they realized the victim had come to them for protection just two weeks earlier.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1969, phone operator Diane Maxwell is murdered. Her brother promised he'd find out who was responsible.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The crime scene was especially violent: A couple had been shot to death. Was their teenage daughter complicit?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young, attractive hairdresser was sexually assaulted and murdered in her own beauty salon. The evidence at the crime scene didn't match any of the suspects and the case went cold for ten years.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When two women went missing and were later found brutally murdered, police wondered if they were victims of a hate crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A skeleton was discovered in the North Carolina marshlands. Investigators learned she'd been dead for months.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After shooting his victims in the head, the killer staged the scene, placed the incriminating evidence into a plastic bag and tossed it into the river.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In a tragic twist of fate, just days after the woman sold her home and moved to a modest trailer, a fire took both the trailer and her life. But the autopsy proved this was no accident.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A security guard disappeared from his post without a trace; his remains were found a year later in a remote camp site.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A college senior was found raped and murdered near an unpaved footpath used by students to walk from one side of campus to the other.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2004, Mary Ann Clibbery was found brutally murdered in her Illinois business and investigators had to determine if this was a robbery gone wrong or a calculated murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2006, Texas real estate agent Sarah Anne Walker was found brutally murdered in a model home.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2003, St. Cloud teenager Jason MacLennan returned home after a night out with friends and discovered his father Ken's body lying in a pool of blood.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2006, Nevada politician Kathy Augustine died mysteriously during a hard-fought re-election campaign and the medical examiner could neither isolate the cause of death.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1996, Virginia Beach police arrive at the Makdessi apartment to find Elise Makdessi and her lover dead.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1999, Patrick McRae was found dead in his Des Moines home and the crime scene was awash with blood.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2000, the body of exotic dancer Rachel Siani was found beneath a New Jersey bridge. Investigators wondered if she had committed suicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2000, construction manager Darrell North was found dead in his work trailer in Ft. Worth, Texas. When investigators arrived, they found that he had been stabbed 46 times.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2000, Judy Southern arrived home from work and was shot by a gunman waiting within. Her husband Allen arrived shortly afterwards, called 911 to report his wife had been shot.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1986, Gary Dale Larson was stabbed to death in his Edmond, Oklahoma home and then the killer sexually assaulted Larson's girlfriend Janet Haynes.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1991, Dorothy Donovan was murdered in her Dover, Delaware home and police are skeptical when her son Charles Holden stated that she was murdered by a hitchhiker he had picked up.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2001, Ginger Hayes and her infant son Nicholas were abducted during a carjacking and the crime had been reported by a witness within minutes of occurrence.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In the early hours of Christmas Eve, a college co-ed was abducted from the parking lot of her apartment.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young woman is found dead in her apartment. With little evidence at the scene, the case turns cold.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a college student is reported missing, police believe their investigation will be like countless others.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A serial rapist is on the loose in a Texas town. No one knew where he'd strike next, but the audacity of his attacks and the escalation of violence against his victims made finding him imperative.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The victim has been stabbed more than thirty times, and the crime scene is awash with her blood. Near her head, police discover a distinctive button with strands of thread still attached.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young woman attends evening church services... then disappears. When her abandoned car is found, the tank is empty and a gas can she kept in her trunk for emergencies is missing.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Volunteers and police spend weeks searching for a missing girl. A psychic later leads them to a field where the body was found.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Digital enhancement of security camera video shows that what appears to be a casual encounter is actually a forced abduction, leading to murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When DNA proves that a man who practically admits to a brutal attack is innocent, police wonder why he is willing to take the blame.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The victim was a self-made man who never minced words. Perhaps he was murdered by a disgruntled client.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A family break turns into a nightmare when the wife is found face-down in a lake; with no idea whether it was murder, an accident or suicide, police turn to a new forensic technique.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The woman in the back of the truck was flailing her arms, screaming. They thought she was doing something dangerous for the fun of it.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When court clerk Peter Porco doesn't report to his work in November 2004, a courts officer is ordered to the Porcos' family home in Bethlehem, NY.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Two suspects are linked to a murder by bloodstained boots and a gun, but the owner of the items says he has never met the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Detectives search for the bombers of two churches in Illinois, hoping that the materials used in the remnants of the handmade bombs will offer the clues to catch the culprits.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: There was no clear reason for a young, healthy college student to be dead. But when the coroner discovered a tiny clue during the autopsy, investigators were able to uncover a mystery.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young woman is stabbed more than 100 times. The killer leaves DNA behind, but investigators must play a cat-and-mouse game to obtain a suspect's DNA to match.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police are able to create a composite sketch of a man burnt beyond recognition. But tracking the killer is more challenging.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Doctors don't know why a scientist is gravely ill. When tests reveal the cause, it's too late to save him.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A bullet-riddled car, a missing driver, and no witnesses, an ambush or a random attack; the clue was something so tiny, it was measured in millionths of a meter.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Even though their daughter had run away before, she'd always come back. Her parents were sure this time would be no different, but they were wrong.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In little more than a month, two women who lived in the same apartment complex were brutally murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a college co-ed vanished without a trace, her fellow students were concerned about her safety and their own.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The victim was well liked and successful, which made the brutality of the crime even harder to understand.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An assistant manager of a Florida steakhouse is stabbed to death. It appears to be a robbery gone wrong.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: James Kenneth Elmen Jr. abducted Julie Estes, then 21, from the Southside convenience store where she worked in 1985.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Tracey Frame, 35, was convicted of killing David Nixon in April 2002 after he planned to end their relationship.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A surgeon is stabbed to death, and the most likely suspect is seen in a restaurant at the time of the murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A killer made great effort to obscure the shoe impressions left when he tracked blood on the floor, but he ended up creating new incriminating evidence...

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police don't have a basis for comparison to match shoe impressions, blood drops and DNA evidence from a murder scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: On May 12, 1994, Crystal Perry was viciously murdered in her home in Bridgton, Maine. Michael Hutchinson, 32, was found guilty of murder in the 1994 slaying at Perry's home.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Rachael Mullenix, 19, was convicted of stabbing her mother and then packing her bloodied corpse in a box.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The brutal murder of a state park employee over $2,000 rattles her co-workers and tourists while leaving police to sift through hundreds of leads.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Foul play is suspected when Fort Worth factory worker Glenda Furch disappears after completing her shift.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police get a clue about a couple who disappeared on Memorial Day weekend during an in-progress robbery.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Fifteen years later, DNA technology leads to justice for a murdered woman and her savagely beaten 4-year-old daughter.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1995, Palm Beach waitress Denise O'Neill is abducted and murdered. Her neighbor Luis Caballero arouses suspicions by his odd behavior toward TV crews covering the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2007, Shamaia Smith disappeared from the strip club she worked at in East Hartford, CT. Police look at various customers of the strip club, but focus on local businessman Kenneth Otto.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2000, Christina Sanoubane was murdered in her Cedar Rapids home after moving away from her abusive boyfriend. There are clues at the scene: bloody footprints and DNA from the victim's rape kit.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2006, Darlene VanderGiesen received threatening emails and then disappeared. Tracking the source of the emails led police to the home of Daphne Wright, where they believe a murder was committed.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2000, Kristine Fitzhugh failed to show up for her music class and her husband Ken found her dead at the bottom of the stairs of their Palo Alto home.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1999, Susan Fassett was gunned down as she left church choir practice in Poughkeepsie, NY. Her husband Jeff became the prime suspect, until he was cleared by police.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2008, Illinois emergency response came upon a garage fire and a man was found crushed beneath a truck.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2007, the Florida home of Effie and Michael Ratley catches fire and Michael heroically rescues his family.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2005, David Castor suffered a slow, agonizing death over a period of days. His wife Stacey maintained it was suicide, even though it was done with antifreeze.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In the 1990s, the media dubbed Richard Rogers the Last Call Killer because he targeted men in gay bars.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Avis Banks and her unborn child were brutally murdered. The body was discovered by her fiancé Keyon Pittman.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2000, when teenager Tara Munsey goes missing after work, it is unknown if she ran away or was murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1989, the dead bodies of Joan Rogers and her two teenage daughters were found floating in Tampa Bay.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2003, Tiffany Rowell and three of her friends were brutally murdered in their affluent Clear Lake, Texas.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2008, college co-ed Jenna Verhaalen was found dead in her Bryan, Texas apartment and petechial hemorrhages in her eyes indicated that she was strangled.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2004, Rebecca Barney and her soon-to-be ex-husband Fred were found shot to death in their Tulsa, Oklahoma, home, which had been set on fire.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2003, Kathy Lorick was murdered on a Concord, California jogging trail in the middle of the day while talking to her husband on her mobile phone.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2008, Colorado real estate developer Alan Helmick was found shot to death at home by his wife Miriam.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A body is found stuffed into a suitcase forcing the police to search though the landfill for another missing victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2004, nursing student Tamika Huston went missing from her Spartanburg, South Carolina home. A tip led detectives to her car and they find an unknown house key that could help solve the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2002, funeral director Lonnie Turner, Sr. was found shot to death. His son Lonnie Jr. became the prime suspect, particularly after it was discovered that the murder was committed with his gun.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Series premiere. A flight attendant went missing and was never seen again. Police proved her husband guilty of murder without finding the body.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A boy is mysteriously shot in his father's gun club. Ballistics, laser technology, scale models and animation reveal the bullet's amazing path and who was responsible.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman disappeared and her husband became the prime suspect especially after police found a huge bloodstain on the carpet of their bedroom. Complex DNA testing proved it was the wife's blood. Now all they had to do was find her body.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: British detectives worked with a pioneering scientist to solve crimes of sexual assault and serial murder. This 1986 case marked the first time DNA was used as evidence in a court of law.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Early one morning in a deserted area outside of Phoenix, a motorcyclist discovered the body of a young woman.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Timothy Wilson Spencer was identified as the man who raped and strangled five young women in Virginia. With the use of DNA profiling, an innocent man is freed and the real killer is convicted.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After a Philadelphia convention, 180 legionnaires contract pneumonia-like symptoms and 29 of them die.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: On the night of May 22, 1992, Betty Wilson returned home and walked up the stairs to the bedroom. She discovered her husband lying in a pool of blood. Jack Wilson had obviously been murdered...but how? And by whom? Even the experts couldn't agree.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: From 1985 to 1988, 18 people were choked, molested and left for dead in the remote mountains of California.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1985, 121 people in South Dakota and Minnesota were struck by a mysterious illness. There had been only one outbreak like it, and when it happened again no one could figure out why.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1971, John List left a note with the bodies of his family members in his mansion before he disappeared.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An 11-year-old Boy Scout comes down with a fever and diarrhea after eating an undercooked burger. When his condition worsens, his mother drives him to a hospital and doctors discover E. coli destroying his body.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Ten bodies had been found between May and November 1984 in Florida. A 17-year-old female named Lisa McVey was abducted but released, leading police to the perpetrator, Bobbie Joe Long.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Eileen and Derrick Severs disappeared from their home in the small village of Hambleton in Great Britain.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Almost a hundred vehicles were involved in the single most deadly automobile accident in American history.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.desc: At the ExCeL Arena in London, England on March 23, 2013. This event featured a super fight between Tyrone Spong and Remy Bonjasky as headliner, this event also featured non-tournament super fight series.

programme.title: K1
programme.sub-title: S01 : E80 K1 WGP 2007 Yokohama - Finals
programme.desc: The top 8 Heavyweight kickboxers in the world compete in a 1 day tournament to see who will be crowned World Grand Prix Champion.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.desc: GLORY 07: Milan at the Mediolanum Forum in Milan, Italy April 20, 2013. This event featured a super fight between Giorgio Petrosyan and Hafid El Boustati as headliner. In co-main event, Murthel Groenhart had to battle with fellow superstar Robin van Roosmalen, this event also featured non-tournament super fight series.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.desc: Glory 08: Tokyo was a kickboxing event held on May 3, 2013 at the Ariake Coliseum in Tokyo, Japan. This event featured a Glory 65kg Slam Tournament.

programme.title: K1
programme.sub-title: S01 : E80 K1 WGP 2007 Yokohama - Finals
programme.desc: The top 8 Heavyweight kickboxers in the world compete in a 1 day tournament to see who will be crowned World Grand Prix Champion.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.desc: GLORY 07: Milan at the Mediolanum Forum in Milan, Italy April 20, 2013. This event featured a super fight between Giorgio Petrosyan and Hafid El Boustati as headliner. In co-main event, Murthel Groenhart had to battle with fellow superstar Robin van Roosmalen, this event also featured non-tournament super fight series.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.desc: Glory 09: New York was a kickboxing event held on June 22, 2013 at the Hammerstein Ballroom in New York City, New York. This event featured a Glory 95kg Slam Tournament.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.sub-title: S00 : E06 GLORY 10 Los Angeles SFS
programme.desc: GLORY 10: Los Angeles on September 28, 2013 at the Citizens Business Bank Arena in Ontario, California. The highlight of the event featured a Glory Middleweight World Championship Tournament.[15] Two tournament matches were held, with a third match as reserve. The winners of the two semi-final bouts, proceeded to the finals for the championship main-event. The event also featured eight other non-tournament bouts.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.desc: GLORY returns to the US with a four-man Middleweight Tournament to decide the GLORY Middleweight title. Plus two lightweight match ups with Robin van Roosmalen taking on Shemsi Beqiri and Davit Kiria meeting Murthel Groenhart.

programme.title: K1
programme.sub-title: S01 : E87 K1 WGP 2008 Seoul - Final 16
programme.desc: Final Elimination tournament for the top sixteen Heavyweigh fighters. The winners qualified for the K-1 World GP 2008 Final.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.desc: Glory 09: New York was a kickboxing event held on June 22, 2013 at the Hammerstein Ballroom in New York City, New York. This event featured a Glory 95kg Slam Tournament.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.sub-title: S00 : E06 GLORY 10 Los Angeles SFS
programme.desc: GLORY 10: Los Angeles on September 28, 2013 at the Citizens Business Bank Arena in Ontario, California. The winners of the two semi-final bouts, proceeded to the finals for the championship main-event. The event also featured eight other non-tournament bouts.

programme.desc: GLORY returns to the US with a four-man Middleweight Tournament to decide the GLORY Middleweight title. Plus two lightweight match ups with Robin van Roosmalen taking on Shemsi Beqiri and Davit Kiria meeting Murthel Groenhart.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.desc: On the preliminary card, a 4-Man Featherweight Contender Tournament and other one-off bouts were featured.Mirko Cro Cop was first scheduled to face Pat Barry, and later Sergei Kharitonov on this card. However, on May 21, it was announced that Kharitonov had to withdraw from the fight due to injury. He was replaced by Jarrell Miller.Miguel Torres was scheduled to make his GLORY debut as a participant of the Featherweight tournament. However, on May 28, it was revealed he pulled out of the tournament for undisclosed reasons. He was replaced by Marcus Vinicius.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: It's decision time on Great British Menu for the chefs from the Wales region. One chef left the competition and only two remain to cook their entire menus for the Great British Menu judges, Prue Leith, Matthew Fort and Oliver Peyton.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Its the battle of the South West chefs returning contenders, Paul Ainsworth and Nathan Outlaw plus newcomer Simon Hulstone. They kick things off with their starters, but which one is going to be first off the blocks?

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Its the battle of the South West chefs returning contenders, Paul Ainsworth and Nathan Outlaw plus newcomer Simon Hulstone. They cook their fish course, but which one but which one will prevail?

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Its the battle of the South West chefs returning contenders, Paul Ainsworth and Nathan Outlaw plus newcomer Simon Hulstone. They cook their main course, but which chef will take gold?

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Its the battle of the South West chefs returning contenders, Paul Ainsworth and Nathan Outlaw plus newcomer Simon Hulstone. Today is the final chance to impress the veteran with their dessert dishes.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: It's decision time on Great British Menu for the chefs from the South West region. One chef left the competition and only two remain to cook their entire menus for the Great British Menu judges, Prue Leith, Matthew Fort and Oliver Peyton.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: The Great British Menu 2012 enters its final week. In todays programme the finalists cook their starters, which will be tasted and scored by the Great British Menu judges and veteran judge Richard Corrigan.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Today the finalists cook their fish dishes, which will be tasted and scored by the Great British Menu judges and veteran judge Marcus Wareing.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Today the chosen finalists cook their main courses, which will be tasted and scored by the Great British Menu judges and veteran judge Tom Kerridge.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Its Desserts day in the finals and the last chance for the competing chefs to impress the judges and veteran Angela Hartnett. The judges finally reveal the winning four dishes which will make up this years Great British Menu.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: The winners have been announced and this final programme follows the successful chefs in the run up to the banquet, as they make the painstaking preparations, for what is one of the most important meals they will ever cook.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Today three of Scotlands top chefs, Jak ODonnell, Jimmy Lee, and Graham Campbell attempt to impress this weeks veteran judge. Returning finalist Jak is determined to make it to the banquet, but newcomers Jimmy and Graham are out to steal her crown.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Today Scottish chefs, Jak ODonnell, Jimmy Lee and Graham Campbell fight it out for the fish course. Graham is in a confident mood but returning finalist Jak and Jimmy are pushing him hard. Will the pressure prove too much for ambitious Graham?

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Today Scottish chefs Jak ODonnell, Jimmy Lee and Graham Campbell are battling to plate up a perfect main course for this weeks veteran chef. Self-taught Jimmy is honouring his Mum with his rendition of her Chinese Beef Stew.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Today its the Scottish chefs last chance to impress, with the dessert course. Only two can cook for the judges tomorrow, and with one chef in the lead after a triumphant main, the pressures on for the other two to plate up perfection.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Today the two remaining Scottish chefs cook their entire menus again for the judges Prue Leith, Oliver Peyton and Matthew Fort. Theyre joined by WI Calendar Girl Angela Baker, who will help decide which chef will go forward to the National Finals.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Today three of the South Wests finest chefs - Jude Kereama, Josh Eggleton and Dominic Chapman - attempt to impress this weeks veteran judge with their starters.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Today the three South West chefs - Jude Kereama, Josh Eggleton and Dominic Chapman fight it out for the fish course. Despite school-boy errors yesterday, experienced Dominic is determined to get a high score today.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Today its a battle for the main course with the three South West chefs - Jude Kereama, Josh Eggleton and Dominic Chapman going head to head.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Today its the last chance for the South Wests chefs to impress, with the dessert course. Only two chefs can go through to cook for the judges so with everything to play for, who will plate up perfection and who will be sent packing?

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Today the two remaining South West chefs cook their entire menus again for the judges Prue Leith, Oliver Peyton and Matthew Fort. Joining the judges is Radhika Bynon, a member of the Forest Gate, Womens Institute, a modern urban group of women.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Today representing Wales Stephen Gomes, Adam Bannister and Phil Carmichael are challenged to plate up perfect starter courses for this weeks veteran judge.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Today the three Welsh chefs - Stephen Gomes, Adam Bannister and Phil Carmichael fight it out for the fish course. Experimental chef Stephen is determined to prove himself with a fish course honouring the WIs tradition of preserving.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Its a battle for the main course with the Welsh chefs - Stephen Gomes, Adam Bannister and Phil Carmichael are going head to head. With all 3 chefs paying homage to Welsh lamb; the pressure is on to deliver a main worthy of their veterans approval.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Today its the tricky dessert course, and the last chance for the Welsh chefs to secure their place in tomorrows regional final. Only two can make it through, and one will leave the competition for good.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Today the two remaining Welsh chefs cook their four courses again for the judges Prue Leith, Oliver Peyton and Matthew Fort along with guest judge and long serving WI member Rosemary Bishton.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Three of Northern Irelands top chefs Chris McGowan, Danni Barry and Ben Arnold go head to head with their starter courses to impress this weeks veteran judge.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Today three of Northern Irelands top chefs Chris McGowan, Danni Barry and Ben Arnold are cooking their fish courses. Ambitious Ben is determined to steal Chriss regional crown.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Today its a battle for the main course for three of Northern Irelands finest chefs Chris McGowan, Danni Barry and Ben Arnold. Ambitious Ben is out to prove himself with a perfect lamb main course.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Its dessert day and the Northern Irish chefs are all striving for one of the two spots in tomorrows Regional Final. The pressure is intense, and in the end one chef must leave the competition empty handed.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Today the two remaining North Irish chefs are cooking all four courses again for the judges Prue Leith, Oliver Peyton and Matthew Fort.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Three newcomers, Mini Patel, Michael OHare and Tim Allen are going head to head this week for a chance to represent the North East region in the National Finals. Today its a battle for starter course, and the first chance to impress their veteran chef.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Its the fight for the fish course, as three of the North Easts finest chefs Mini Patel, Michael OHare and Tim Allen are out to impress.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Today three of the North Easts most dynamic chefs - Mini Patel, Michael OHare and Tim Allen - go head to head cooking their main courses. Michelin starred Tim is super keen to bag the first ten of the week, but Michael and Mini are hot on his heels.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Its the North East chefs last chance to impress with the dessert course. Its been a week of highs and lows, modern audacious dishes and classic masterpieces but with only two places are up for grabs cooking for the judges.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Two remaining North East chefs must cook all four courses again for the judges Prue Leith, Oliver Peyton and Matthew Fort. Theyre joined by a guest judge who will help decide who will go through to represent the North East in the National Finals.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Representing the North West are Eve Townson, Matt Worswick and returning contender Mark Ellis. Todays the starter course, and after failing to cook for the judges last year Marks out to redeem himself.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Its the fish course, as three of the North Wests finest chefs Eve Townson, Matt Worswick and Mark Ellis go head to head. Eve and Matt are hoping their classic approach to cooking fish will win the day.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Its the battle for the main course for the three North West chefs - Eve Townson, Matt Worswick and Mark Ellis. Mark remains determined and focused on his battle to get to judges chamber this year.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Today its the North West chefs last chance to impress, with the dessert course. Only two can cook for the judges tomorrow Its the end of the road for one chef, but who will it be?

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Today the two remaining North West chefs cook their entire menus again for the judges Prue Leith, Oliver Peyton and Matthew Fort. Theyre joined by award winning food writer Sabrina Ghayour.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.sub-title: S10 : E31 London and South East Starter
programme.desc: Today its the starter course for three of London and the South Easts hottest chefs Matt Gillan, Lee Westcott and Marcus Wareings protg Mark Froydenlund.

programme.desc: Its dessert day and the London and South East chefs are striving to secure one of the two spots in tomorrows Regional Final. The scores are close, so its all to play for, as today marks the end of the competition for one man.

programme.title: Great British Menu

programme.desc: Today three of the Central Regions finest chefs, Pip Lacey, Richard Bainbridge and Jason Hodnett, attempt to impress this weeks veteran judge with their starters. With big boots to fill, Angela Hartnetts protg Pip is the only newcomer in the kitchen.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Today the three Central Region chefs - newcomer Pip Lacey, 4th time competitor Richard Bainbridge and returning chef Jason Hodnett fight it out for the fish course. Pip is hoping to outclass her rivals with smoked haddock dish inspired by her Grandma.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Its the battle for the fish course, and those chefs who didnt make it onto the shortlist with their starters yesterday are hoping to do better today.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Its main course day, the half-way point in Finals Week, and those chefs who have yet to get a dish on the shortlist are feeling the heat. The standards are higher than ever before.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Today its a battle for dessert, and the last chance for the 8 regional champions to get a dish in contention for the final banquet. Those whove failed to make the judges shortlist so far are going all out.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: The banquet is finally here. Its the culmination of months of hard work as the winning chefs strive to plate up perfect dishes for the ladies of the Womens Institute, at Londons historic Drapers Hall where pioneers of the WI once gathered.

programme.title: Great British Menu

programme.title: Great British Menu

programme.title: Watch Out Gringo! Sabata Will Return
programme.desc: A gang of bandits, led by the infamous Luke Morgan, hijacks a stagecoach carrying an army gold strongbox and takes a hostage. But when Carrancho steals the gold from them, hiding it in a grave, the chase intensifies. Both sides race to recover the treasure, with lives at stake and a relentless pursuit in the wild.

programme.title: West of the Divide
programme.desc: Ted Hayden impersonates a wanted man and joins Gentry's gang only to learn later that Gentry was the one who killed his father. He saves Virginia Winters' dad's ranch from Gentry and also rescues his long-lost brother Spud.

programme.title: Three Lead Dollars
programme.desc: Rudy returns home to revenge his father's death, fighting local bandits.

programme.title: Bullwhip
programme.desc: In order to avoid the hangman's noose, a cowboy agrees to marry a beautiful but fiery redhead.

programme.title: Payment in Blood
programme.desc: In 1867 Texas, after the Civil War, Colonel Thomas Blake and his men refuse to surrender, raiding Yankee towns. Rumors swirl that Blake kills for pleasure, not the Confederacy, leading to large bounties for his capture. However, Blake seeks $200,000 that vanished during the war from Confederate coffers. He sends Chamaco Gonzales to track down the missing fortune, hidden in General Beauregard's strong box.

programme.title: Heroes of Fort Worth
programme.desc: During the Civil War, a group of confederate soldiers with the help of Apache Indians, try to defeat a Union fort, while trying to gain support from Emperor Maximillian of Mexico.

programme.title: Five Guns West
programme.desc: Shalee Jethro (Dorothy Malone) helps her father run a desert stagecoach station.

programme.title: Boot Hill Bandits
programme.desc: Shady town businessman Bolton seems to be the leader of the gang but even he takes his order from a higher authority who may have tried to take Marshal Corrigan's life.

programme.title: Rage at Dawn
programme.desc: A special agent from Chicago is sent out west to bring in the notorious Reno brothers.

programme.title: Baker's Hawk
programme.desc: When a young boy nurses an injured hawk back to health, he gains newfound courage and confidence on his own.

programme.title: Fat Brothers of Trinity
programme.desc: The bizarre adventures of the three gunmen Western grosser, next to a delicate young.

programme.title: Captain Apache
programme.desc: A Native American born US Army officer, Captain Apache, investigating a murder, uncovers a presidential assassination plot.

programme.title: Up the MacGregors
programme.desc: The Macgregor family is back and this time they have their women with them, in the hunt for the men who have stolen their gold.

programme.title: Tequila aka Fuzzy the Hero
programme.desc: Tequila and Bobo hit the little town of Chedron intending to rob the local bank whose owner, De Koven, is trying to freeze out all the ranchers in the area by the simple expedient of foreclosing on the mortgages his bank holds on their land.

programme.title: Ramon the Mexican
programme.desc: Ramon avenges his brother's murder and kills the Baxter Family.

programme.title: Brother Outlaw
programme.desc: A man is falsely charged with bank robbery, prompting his brother to break him out of prison.

programme.title: The Star Packer
programme.desc: A gang working for The Shadow is terrorizing the town. John Travers decides to take on the job of sheriff and do something about it.

programme.title: Return of Sabata
programme.desc: Hobsonville's citizens hire a gunslinger to rid them of the McIntock clan that is forcibly and unlawfully taxing the townsfolk under the pretext of town development.

programme.title: Black Jack
programme.desc: After a bank robbery, Jack Murphy's gang turns on him when they suspect he’ll keep the loot. They torture him and kill his sister, but Jack survives. Now, he rides for revenge in this gritty Western tale of betrayal, violence, and retribution.

programme.title: Requiescant
programme.desc: The adopted son of a preacher comes upon a village that is under the thumb of a deranged ex-Confederate officer, who is - among other things - stealing land from the locals with phony land grants.

programme.title: Gentleman Killer
programme.desc: A quiet border town erupts into chaos as tensions rise between the US and Mexico. The cause? A ruthless Mexican bandit determined to kill as many US soldiers as possible. As political turmoil intensifies, the town becomes the center of a deadly conflict, where vengeance, power, and survival collide.

programme.title: Three Graves for a Winchester
programme.desc: Ringo Carson has a tough life. First, he has a falling out with his best friend, Frank Sanders, after saving Jane, the girl he loves, from Mexican kidnappers in order to extort a ransom from her gunrunner father.

programme.title: Git Along Little Dogies
programme.desc: When war breaks out between oilmen and cattle ranchers, Gene sides with the ranchers until he learns that oil will bring a railroad to town.

programme.title: Don't Wait, Django... Shoot!
programme.desc: Django returns home to discover that his father has been killed by local bandits in a business deal gone wrong.

programme.title: Something Big
programme.desc: A man kidnaps the wife of a cavalry commander in order to exchange her for a Gatling gun that's being sold by a gun runner.

programme.title: The Plunderers
programme.desc: Cavalry officer John Drum attempts to track down outlaw Whit Lacey, but finds he must join forces with Lacey to fight a Sioux war party.

programme.title: In a Colt's Shadow
programme.desc: A story about two gunfighters, Duke and Steve. Steve is in love with Duke's daughter but Duke disapproves of the match, envisioning a life of hardship and danger for the girl if she marries Steve.

programme.title: A Minute to Pray, a Second to Die
programme.desc: In Tuscola, New Mexico, the Governor offers amnesty papers to all outlaws but gunfighter Clay McCord's appearance triggers a violent confrontation between the local marshal, McCord, and other outlaws

programme.title: A Town Called Hell
programme.desc: A group of Mexican revolutionaries murders a town priest and a number of his christian followers. Ten years later, a widow arrives in town intent to take revenge from her husband's killers.

programme.title: Gunman of One Hundred Crosses
programme.desc: An Irishman is killed in the wild West. His son Jimmy goes out searching for the killers of his father, but is soon ambushed by two highwaymen, and killed, too.

programme.title: The Gay Cavalier
programme.desc: The Cisco Kid embarks on a dual mission: rescuing a girl from a marriage to a false suitor and tracking down outlaws who robbed a gold-carrying stage. His task becomes clearer when he discovers that the so-called wealthy suitor is secretly behind the robbery. Cisco must untangle love, deception, and crime to bring justice.

programme.title: White Fang
programme.desc: The wolf dog, White Fang, aids a reporter, a fur trapper, a nun, a young Eskimo boy and his father of ridding a gold mining town of a sleazy crime lord in 1896 Yukon, Canada.

programme.title: Maddie and Kiki's BBQ Barn

programme.desc: Fun-loving sisters and expert grillmasters Maddie and Kiki welcome you into their country barn for craveable eats and spicy jokes! On this episode, smoke tilapia, whip up veggie quesadillas, and grill a chicken sandwich like you’ve never seen before!

programme.title: Watts On the Grill
programme.desc: Barbecuing bananas, that's crazy. Chef Spencer Watts shows us how to grill the delicate, evERS-scrumptious fruit. Bananas.

programme.title: Watts On the Grill
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Fish on the Grill
programme.desc: Fish. Flaky, flavoursome, and perfect for barbeque. High energy host Spencer Watts tests out his grill with delightfully tender fish dishes.

programme.title: Watts On the Grill
programme.desc: Shellfish is delicate, tantalizing, and full of flavour, especially when it's grilled to perfection

programme.title: Watts On the Grill
programme.desc: Barbeque is all about sauces, rubs and marinades

programme.title: Watts On the Grill
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 Salsa that will Dance on Your Tongue
programme.desc: Salsa means undeniable flavour! Lively host Spencer Watts plays with sweet, salty, and spicy in four amazing salsa recipes.

programme.title: Watts On the Grill
programme.desc: Grilling expert Spencer Watts hosts a tasty beef-a-palooza with four incredible beef cuts including smoked brisket and succulent beef tenderloin.

programme.title: Watts On the Grill
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 Barbeque isn’t Just for Meat
programme.desc: Barbeque is not just about meat! Chef Spencer Watts shows us how to grill fruits and vegetables like a pro.

programme.title: Watts On the Grill
programme.sub-title: S01 : E09 Grilled, Roasted & Charred Chicken
programme.desc: Charismatic host Spencer Watts shows us why chicken is best on the grill with four irresistible chicken recipes.

programme.title: Watts On the Grill
programme.desc: There are limitless options with lamb on the grill! Host Spencer Watts offers some tips and tricks on how to prepare four different cuts of lamb.

programme.title: Watts On the Grill
programme.desc: Whether for a small family dinner or a big backyard barbeque, host Spencer Watts shows us the best ways to grill up tasty duck, turkey, capon, and quail.

programme.title: Watts On the Grill
programme.sub-title: S01 : E12 Sides & Sweets with Heat
programme.desc: Never underestimate the power of a good side or dessert! Fun host Spencer Watts grills up the perfect sides and treats for your next barbeque.

programme.title: Watts On the Grill
programme.sub-title: S01 : E13 Pork was Made for Barbeques
programme.desc: Pork and the grill are good buddies and host Spencer Watts shows us four of his favourite pork recipes that will have you salivating.

programme.title: Watts On the Grill
programme.desc: Fun and quirky host Chef Spencer Watts kicks off this episode by showing off his knife skills as he sabres a pineapple to start his instant classic; Grilled Fruit Salad. The pineapple joins a mix of bright summer fruits on the grill, then berries, spicy citrus vinaigrette and savoury feta cheese. Next up, Spencer whips up his Hawaiian Chicken recipe. Spiced with cayenne and Chinese five spice, Spencer stuffs flavourful chicken thighs with pineapple and grills it with a delightful ginger and soy sauce. Every bite is sweet, savoury, and fresh - exactly how summer should taste! Then Spencer shares his top tips for adding smoky flavours to pork using an easy and handy smoke pouch. His Apple Smoked Pork Tenderloin is bathed in a fog of applewood smoke and he then tops it with tart apple-blueberry compote. Cinnamon buns are amazing with a bit of orange peel - but have you ever had them in an orange peel and on the grill? That's right and Spencer shows you how you can make fun and flavourful Orange Peel Cinnamon Buns on the barbecue using indirect heat.

programme.title: Watts On the Grill
programme.sub-title: S02 : E02 Allium in the Family
programme.desc: Onions, green onions, chives, garlic, and leeks are all members of the same fabulous flowering family, Allium! First up? Chef Watts shows us his sweet and smoky Charred Leeks with Romesco; add grilled toast and you have your next party appetizer! Next up is a main course. Spencer starts with a juicy grilled pork chop, then adds roasted garlic melted into a balsamic onion chutney to make his out-of-this-world Roasted Garlic Pork Chops. Looking for a crowd pleaser that's easy to make? Spencer has a recipe for that! Chicken Yakitori. He threads skewers with crunchy green onions and tender chicken and caramelizes the yakitori sauce as he grills this tasty dish. Are you ready to drool? Spencer shows us how to make Allium your main dish with Stuffed Vidalia Onions. Loaded with savoury bacon, salty blue cheese and garlic, you'll want to eat this dish for every meal!

programme.title: Watts On the Grill
programme.desc: Have a cheese lover coming over? Blow their minds with some of Spencer's "grate" barbecued cheese recipes! First up, Spencer chars Brie Cheese to an ooey-gooey perfection and tops it with tart cherries and crunchy walnuts, serving it with crispy grilled crostinis. Next up is a Grilled Steak and Caesar with a twist only Spencer could add - grilled... lettuce! Then, Spencer uses the classic German "hasselback" presentation to stuff chicken breasts with verdant spinach, yummy Swiss cheese and pungent sun- dried tomatoes, grilling them to melty perfection. Finally, Spencer fires up his barbecue to make his Grilled Peaches with Salted Bourbon Caramel, a decadent dessert elevated with creamy Mascarpone and perfectly balances sweet, smoky, and salty flavours.

programme.title: Maddie and Kiki's BBQ Barn
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Smoked Seafood & Sister Sass
programme.desc: Fun-loving sisters and expert grillmasters Maddie and Kiki welcome you into their country barn for craveable eats and spicy jokes! On this episode, they smoke salmon to turn it into pastrami, whip up a colorful Caribbean salad, and grill savory rosemary-seasoned pork chops!
