programme.title: Road Grill
programme.desc: Matt and his team hit fitness central and cook up a grilled feast that is high on protein and lean on fat including Salt Crusted Peel and Eat Shrimp; Lime Chipotle Pork Medallions; Mesquite Smoked Turkey with Peach Glaze and a Sweet and Spicy Black Bean Salad.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.desc: Matt and the Road Grill team are pitching in to feed volunteers some great grilled chow including Lime Jalapeno Chicken Wings with Raita Dip; Beef Ribs with Vinegar Bbq Sauce; Killer Bbq Fries with Homemade Ketchup and Some Ice Cold Kiwi Melon Frostys

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.desc: Matt and the Team join some friends at a Cottage Party to celebrate the end of school. They keep the festivities going with Bbqed Rib Eye Steaks with a Chimmi Churri Sauce; Jerk Pulled Pork Sandwiches with Fresh Mango; Roasted Garlic Onion Potatoes and Greek Salad in a Pita.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.desc: Not only do the racers in the Soap Box Derby have a need for speed, they have a need for BBQ! Matt and the RG team cook up a feast to slow down any speedster. The menu: Smoked Shrimp B.L.T., Pineapple Basil Rotisserie Chicken, Grilled Sweet Potato Pops, and Summer Berry Pudding.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.sub-title: S02 : E02 Day By the Water
programme.desc: Matt spends the day by the water; fishing, playing Frisbee, catching some rays. What goes with water and sun? BBQ!!! Matt & his team make a seafood buffet of Grilled Clams in the Shell with Serrano Ham, Smoked Lake Rainbow Trout, Grilled Lobster with Grapefruit Salsa, and Crab-Stuffed Avocados.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.desc: Matt gets down and dirty playing some beach Volleyball. In between bumps, sets, and spikes, the RG team serves up a smorgasbord of great food. The menu: Grilled Chicken Breast on Foccacia with Grilled Apples & Cambozola Cheese, Sezchuan Ribs with Chunky Plum Dipping Sauce, Roasted Corn and Pepper Potato Salad, and Homemade Protein Bars

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.desc: Forget bicycle built for two. This Big Bike fits 30 people! Matt & the team join forces with the Heart & Stroke foundation to raise money by riding around a track. Matt feeds these 'bikers' some healthy and delicious grub. The menu: Grilled Calamari, Smoked Turkey Fajitas, Grilled Scallops and Watermelon Salsa, and Cold Gazpacho.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.desc: It's a bird, it's a plane, it's a day of great BBQ. Inspired by the aerial acrobatics of CF18's and Harvards, Matt cooks up a variety of poultry and fowl. The menu: Bacon Wrapped Quail Stuffed with 3 Cream Cheeses, Raspberry Chipotle Turkey Wings, Grilled Balsamic Marinated Duck Breast, and Deviled Eggs.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.desc: Whether you're a pro or a beginner, everyone is welcome to join the Road Grill team at the 19th tee where Matt is busy burnin' up his Q's. What better way to end your day at the links with an enticing menu of Miso Citrus Grilled Sablefish, Smoked Rack of Pork with a Sour Cherry Sauce , Lemon Basil Smashed Potatoes with Mushrooms, Arugula Salad with Peaches, and Blue Cheese and Walnuts.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.desc: In between hoisting sails and scrubbing the deck, Matt and his team prepare a feast for the sailors before going on a long voyage. Not only is the weather perfect for sailing, it's perfect for BBQing! The menu: Scallop Corn Bacon Burger, Maple-apple Brined Pork Chops, Grilled Tuna Bruschetta, and Strawberry Marscapone Trifle.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.desc: Teddy Bears of all age, shape, and size join our grill team with their owners for a day of games, rides and some teddy bear repair. Matt & the RG team are BBQing a menu even the pickiest eater will love. The menu: Grilled Almond Butter & Banana Sandwiches, Grilled Meatball Sub, Smoked White Cheddar Macaroni, and Quick & Snappy Ginger Lemon Ice Cream Sandwiches.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.desc: Llamas, horses, and pigs...Oh My! The RG team lends it support to a farm animal rescue. Matt sets up his grills during a weekend fundraiser and stays friendly to his animal buddies by serving up a vegetarian menu. The menu: Portobello Burger Stack, Smoked Corn Tamale with Goat Cheese& Salsa Fresca, Pizza Salad Sandwich, and Tabbouleh Salad

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.sub-title: S02 : E10 Day at the Pool
programme.desc: The neighbourhood outdoor pool is a great way to cool down on a hot summer day. Matt and the Grill Team are dipping their feet in the pool, splashing with the kids, and, of course, grilling up some fabulous eats to munch on while playing in the park or relaxing on your towel. The menu: BBQ'd Pork Tenderloin & Pears on Bagels, Grilled Asian Chicken Burger, Surf & Turf Kabobs with Arugula Pesto, and BBQ'd Cinnamon Donuts.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.desc: It's graduation day at Chef School and Matt and the Grill team are sharing in the festivities. To congratulate the new Chefs, Matt has cooked up a masterful menu of fancy, yet simple, dishes. The menu: Mixed Seafood Grill on a Plank, Maple Rosemary Rotisserie Chicken, Dunked Hunan Lamb Rack, and Salmon Pastrami.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.desc: The Road Grill team goes rural and gets lost in hedge mazes at Saunders Farm. Luckily, they find their way out in time to cook up some BBQ and feed all families at the farm. The menu: Grilled Chicken Legs with Crunchy Chip Crust, Smoked Ham with Maple Mustard Glaze, Planked Asparagus Bundles with Cheese and Prosciutto, and Cobb Salad.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.desc: Matt and the Road Grill Team get in the saddle and get inspired to grill up some BBQ! With a full school of riders to feed they grill up some Wild West plates. The menu: Texas Rockets, Perfect Beef Jerky, Beef Brisket, and Hearty Beet & fennel Salad.

programme.title: Pressure's On
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Four Flavours, Four Dishes…One Multi-Cooker!
programme.desc: Using just one pot, host Vanessa Gianfrancesco cooks four delicious dishes including Peachy Pulled Pork Tacos and a Lime and Basil Pie.

programme.title: Pressure's On
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 Hearty Weeknight Multi-Cooker Dishes
programme.desc: Do you know the secret to an uncracked cheesecake? Host Vanessa Gianfrancesco shares her trick to making a perfectly silky-smooth Salted Caramel Cheesecake.

programme.title: Pressure's On
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 Classic Sunday Dishes Made in Weeknight Time
programme.desc: Charming cook Vanessa Gianfrancesco cooks up four multi-cooker dishes that save on time but are bursting with flavour.

programme.title: Pressure's On
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 Four Fresh Dinners that are Always on Time
programme.desc: Host Vanessa Gianfrancesco cooks up four dinners in minutes using her multi-cooker including a delicious Lasagna and mouth-watering Burrito Bowl with Chermoula.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Eat your Fruits and Veggies
programme.desc: Don't forget to eat your fruits and veggies! Host Jessica McGovern shows us how to include nutritious ingredients into our decadent desserts.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.desc: Host Jessica McGovern gives us a sweet taste of chocolate heaven with an overload of chocolatey desserts including a decadent Bombe au Chocolat.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.desc: High tea requires royal desserts! Host Jessica McGovern gives us the lowdown on some sophisticated sweets to pair with a warm cup of tea.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.desc: Talented host Jessica McGovern shows us how to impress both kids and adults with three ovERS-the-top desserts including a magical Geode Cake.

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.desc: Here's a tongue twister: Theresa, tuna, tangerine! In this episode, host Theresa Visintin picks her favourite letter, "T," and introduces us to scrumptious recipes using tuna and tangerine. Theresa loves tuna and Italian cuisine, so naturally she combines both to create a mouth-watering pasta with some savoury tomato, olive, and tuna sauce. Next, Theresa satisfies her sweet tooth with a decadent tangerine parfait! Using the sweet juice of the tangerine, Theresa creates gelatin, with a hint of orange liqueur. She tops it all off by whipping up a fluffy cream to complete this sweet treat. Then it's time for a real challenge: tuna and tangerine in one recipe!

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.desc: In this "H" challenge, Chef Lauren Gulyas decides to take on the unique flavours of halibut and horseradish. She starts with a perfectly prepared prosciutto wrapped halibut, pairing the buttery flavour of the fish with the saltiness of the cured meat. Throw in some dill potatoes and you've got a beautifully balanced dish. Next up, Chef Lauren show us how to make a delightful roast beef dip with a zesty horseradish sauce using carrots, vinegar, mayo and a little lemon. Finally, she is challenged to make a dish that combines both ingredients, and does she ever deliver!

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.desc: In this letter "P" challenge, Chef Robert Jewell showcases his vegetarian skills using pecans and peppers. Despite his cowboy roots, Robert shows us he can kick it with vegetarians by cooking up a juicy meatless "meatloaf" using pecans. But, no "meatloaf" would be complete without a gravy! Robert fries up earthy portobello mushrooms before adding a special ingredient to thicken the gravy, you guessed it -- pecans! Now, on to peppers. Robert doubles up, using both the vegetable and seasoning, to make a delicious red pepper coulis with herb and pepper crusted beef tenderloin. Robert goes a little nuts when he prepares his final recipe using both pecans and peppers.

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.desc: Cheese or chocolate? Why not both! In this "C" challenge, host Theresa Visintin takes on both decadent ingredients. But first, she shows us that being cheesy is easy, especially when you stuff chicken breast with creamy goat's cheese and finely diced apples. Theresa takes the flavour one step further by coating the stuffed chicken with sage, parmesan, and panko bread crumbs, then frying it to a crispy golden brown. Next, Theresa whips up a dessert fan favourite, the decadent and oh-so-irresistible dark chocolate lava cake. Finally, Theresa has an irresistible recipe using ooey gooey cheese and warm chocolate.

programme.title: DNA Dinners
programme.desc: Endearing host Tyrone Edwards surprises South African-born Shameen Miller with the results of her DNA test. Shameen cooks a meal that combines her two cultures and shares it with her family.

programme.title: DNA Dinners
programme.desc: Host Tyrone Edwards shocks Andrea Titus with her DNA results. Blending her two cultures onto one plate, Andrea then cooks up a delicious and revealing meal for her family.

programme.title: DNA Dinners
programme.desc: Host Tyrone Edwards reveals to Laird Hercules that his DNA includes other ancestry besides Guyanese. In the DNA Dinners kitchen, he cooks up a delicious meal that combines his known and newfound cultures.

programme.title: DNA Dinners
programme.desc: Mary Bosco is Italian, but Host Tyrone Edwards surprises her by revealing that her DNA test includes roots from other places. Mary cooks a special meal for her family that combines her two cultures.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 Magic in the Middle
programme.desc: Host Jessica McGovern gives us a little surprise on the inside by baking up tasty filled goodies.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.desc: Make hosting your next shower a cinch with Jessica McGovern's simple and super cute recipes - like tiny Oatmeal Cookie Cheesecake Cups!

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.desc: Flowers aren't just for smelling - they're great for baking too! Host Jessica McGovern shows us how to bake some tasty desserts with a floral twist.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.desc: Host Jessica McGovern shows us the versatility of eggs by baking up some tasty, egg-centric desserts like CrÍ¨me Brulee and Lemon Meringue Pie.

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.desc: For this "N" challenge, Chef Lauren Gulyas works with noodles and nectarines. For her first dish, Lauren cooks up a breaded nectarine and mozzarella stack. Talking technique, she shows us how to cut nectarines into rounds. She does the same with some soft mozzarella and then walks us through the art of a balsamic reduction. For the noodles, Chef Lauren puts an elegant twist on your childhood favourite with a lobster mac and cheese. She spares no flavours, adding fried bacon, garlic, cayenne pepper, mustard powder, and even dry vermouth. This is no ordinary noodle dish. But now for the real challenge! Chef Lauren works with the noodles and nectarines.

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.desc: In this episode, Chef Robert Jewell explores recipes using two very different ingredients that start with the letter "O," oats and okra. For his first dish, Robert uses okra in a classic cornmeal cake recipe, but bumps up the flavour factor with spicy jalapenos. Robert balances the heat of the jalapeno with a tart green tomato and crunchy red onion salsa. In his next recipe, Robert keeps the heat, but switches up his recipes for a curry-spiced oat pancake. This Indian inspired dish needs something to cool it down and Robert knows exactly what that is - sweet, silky applesauce! He's up for the challenge when it comes to combining okra and oats into one dish, and the results are tasty!

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.desc: Culinary expert Theresa Visintin picks the letter "B" and must combine beef with buttermilk for her challenge. But first, she works with the ingredients separately. Silky buttermilk lends itself perfectly to Theresa's battered blooming onion recipe. Using the biggest onion she can find, Theresa skillfully slices from the root down, ensuring it will bloom into a beautiful flower. She coats the Vidalia onion in egg, buttermilk and smoky spiced flour, before deep frying it. Next up, it's time for beef to get the Theresa treatment, as she prepares a crowd favourite- smoky, juicy, fall-off-thebone baked beef brisket. With the perfect balance of sweet and spicy, this meal will make you look forward to leftovers...if there are any! Now for the challenge - Theresa skillfully blends beef with buttermilk in a recipe that will tempt your taste buds.

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.desc: After picking "M" for this episode's challenge, Chef Lauren Gulyas decides to make meal magic using maple and mahi-mahi. She starts by combining chestnut and quinoa to create a mouth-watering medley, rich in flavour and texture. Chef Lauren adds shiitake mushrooms and drizzles the dish with a balsamic vinegar, maple syrup and rosemary dressing. Next up, she steams Mahi-mahi with red chilies and lemongrass, this savoury spice is a heavenly combination with an invigorating aroma. For the challenge, Chef Lauren seamlessly introduces both maple and mahimahi into one flavourful fusion.

programme.title: Maddie and Kiki's BBQ Barn
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Southern Smoke & Sizzlin' Sides
programme.desc: Fun-loving sisters and expert grillmasters Maddie and Kiki welcome you into their country barn for craveable eats and spicy jokes! On this episode, they smoke a beef brisket, whip up some delicious Texas sides, and show you how to smoke a daikon!

programme.title: FIGHT VAULT
programme.desc: Ultimate Warrior Challenge is one of Europe's leading MMA shows, since it's inception in 2006 it's has grown steadily and delivered some of the most exciting MMA fights Europe has seen, with a truly Internationalfight roster, UWC has built a solid reputation for bringing some of the Worlds toughest fighters to square off in the UWC octagon, fighters from the UK, USA, Brazil, Sweden, Italy, Africa, Poland, France, Cyprus, Greece have all fought in the UWC cage.

programme.title: FIGHT VAULT
programme.desc: In a showdown between the winners from Series 1 and the powerhouse Russian Red Devils, Mario Rinaldi is in tough against Sergey Kaznovski. The Russian is reknowned for short, brutal fights, earning him a reputation as the king of the 1st round KO. This is not the first time Trevor Pragley and Andrei Semenov have met in the ring. Last time, Semenov was battered into submission, so he come into this fight hungry for revenge.

programme.title: Vetovoiman lait
programme.desc: Tehokkaat avioerolakimiehet Audrey Woods ja Daniel Rafferty ovat nähneet rakkauden menevän pieleen kaikissa pahimmissa skenaarioissaan – kuinka huonot heidän mahdollisuutensa voisivat olla?

programme.title: The Gift
programme.desc: Nuori pari Simon (Bateman) ja Robyn (Hall) törmäävät sattumalta kaupassa Simonin vanhaan ja miltei unohdettuun tuttavaan, erikoislaatuiseen Gordoon (Edgerton). Miehen yltyvä kiinnostus pariskuntaa kohtaan, mystiset lahjalähetykset ja lopulta synkkä paljastus Simonin menneisyydestä riuhtaisee heidän seesteisen elämänsä kammottavaan syöksykierteeseen.

programme.title: Gourmet Club
programme.desc: Paavo Ylönen kuuluu yläluokkaiseen Gourmet Clubiin, johon jokainen jäsen tuo vuorollaan eksoottisen raaka-aineen. Se, joka tunnistaa mikä kätkeytyy gourmet-annokseen, voittaa suuren summan rahaa. Perintönsä pelannut Ylönen tarjoaa klubilaisille mystisen aterian, jonka raaka-ainetta kukaan ei arvaa. Ateria aiheuttaa kuitenkin sellaisen vaikutuksen, että he kaikki haluavat sitä uudestaan ja uudestaan. Ylönen saa paljon enemmän kuin osasi toivoakaan.

programme.title: Teen Spirit
programme.desc: Rikkinäisessä perheessä kasvanut 17-vuotias Violet (Fanning) unelmoi pop-tähteydestä ja paosta pienestä englantilaisesta kotikylästään. Toivoa hänelle tuo kansallinen laulukilpailu Teen Spirit ja epätavallinen mentori, joka opettaa häntä laulamaan sydämestään. Tie menestykseen on kuitenkin täynnä vaaroja ja houkutuksia. Violetin on voitettava epävarmuutensa uskaltaakseen olla oma itsensä ja päästäkseen lopulta loistamaan.

programme.title: Autumn in New York
programme.desc: Will Keane on viittäkymppiä lähestyvä menestyvä newyorkilainen ravintoloitsija ja parantumaton naistenmies. Mies purjehtii suhteesta toiseen - kunnes hän kohtaa nuoren Charlotten. Vielä kokematon Charlotte on sulaa vahaa maailmanmiehen käsittelyssä, mutta romanssi saa tylyn lopun. Will tajuaa menettäneensä kenties viimeisen tilaisuuden todelliseen rakkauteen. Voiko vanha tiikeri päästä eroon raidoistaan? Will päättää yrittää...

programme.title: Paluu Yorkshireen
programme.desc: Arthur Morrison (Jim Broadbent) saa tietää, että hänellä on syöpä ja vain muutama viikko aikaa elää. Hänen vanhin poikansa Blake (Oscar-voittaja* Colin Firth) muuttaa Yorkshireen äitinsä luokse, kylään jossa hän syntyi. Kun Arthurin tila heikkenee, Blake puntaroi suhdettaan isäänsä. Hän muistaa yhteiset hetket, heidän läheisyytensä ja heidän erimielisyytensä. Kun isä kuolee, Blake alkaa muistella heidän välistä sidettä – ristiriitoja, turhautumisia, rakkautta ja menetyksiä, jotka kaikki kuuluvat monimutkaiseen suhteeseen isän ja pojan välillä.

programme.title: I Love You Phillip Morris
programme.desc: Tositapahtumiin perustuva komedia mallikansalaisesta Steven Russellista (JIM CARREY), jonka radikaalilla elämänmuutoksella on hintansa. Patologisen valehtelijan munaukset vievät miehen suoraan kaapista häkkiin, kun hän jää luksuselämänsä rahoittamiseen kehitetyistä superhuijauksista kiinni rysän päältä. Vankilassa Stevenin yllättää kuitenkin takaapäin rynnivä rakkaus, jota huijarin taipumukset ja poliisien pamput kuitenkin vaikeuttavat. Stevenillä on kuitenkin sairaita suunnitelmia rakastuneen parin saattamiseksi jälleen yhteen...

programme.title: Conviction
programme.desc: Bettyn veli tuomitaan murhasta, jolloin alkaa 18 vuoden taistelu järjestelmää vastaan. Betty uskoo veljensä syyttömyyteen, joten hän alkaa opiskella oikeustiedettä voidakseen puolustaa veljeään oikeudessa!

programme.title: A Dangerous Method
programme.desc: Todellisiin tapahtumiin perustuva elokuva psykoanalyysin synnystä kertoo psykiatri Carl Jungin, hänen mentorinsa Sigmund Freudin ja kauniin mutta mieleltään järkkyneen Sabina Spielreinin myrskyisästä suhteesta. Kunnianhimoinen tohtori Carl Jung (Michael Fassbender) ottaa potilaakseen epätasapainoisen mutta kauniin Sabina Spielreinin (Keira Knightley). Jung tarttuu mahdottomaan haasteeseen aseenaan kuuluisan Sigmund Freudin (Viggo Mortensen) kumouksellinen menetelmä. Kumpikin mies joutuu Sabinan lumoihin. Zürichiin ja Wieniin ennen ensimmäistä maailmansotaa sijoittuva tarina sukeltaa syvälle ihmismielen ja seksuaalisuuden syövereihin.

programme.title: Ride
programme.desc: Newyorkilainen työhullu kustannustoimittaja Jackie (Helen Hunt) seuraa poikaansa (Brenton Thwaites) Los Angelesiin. Poika haluaa jättää opiskelut sikseen ja elää unelmaansa Kaliforniassa, missä myös äidillä on pian edessään tyrskyjä ja kuohuja. Lämminhenkisessä komediassa Jackie tutustuu limusiinikuskiinsa (David Zayas), löytää seksin ilot nuoren surffauksen opettajan (Luke Wilson) kanssa ja tutustuu uudestaan poikaansa, itseensä ja maailmaan.

programme.title: Lucky Number Slevin
programme.desc: Slevin (Josh Hartnett) joutuu vahingossa keskelle New Yorkin pahimpien rikollispomojen Rabbin ja Bossin veristä sotaa. Slevinin kannoilla pyörivät lisäksi sinnikäs poliisi Brikowski ja pahamaineinen tappaja Goodkat (Bruce Willis). Hänen on keksittävä viheliäinen juoni päästäkseen heistä ennen kuin on itse mennyttä.

programme.title: Unelmien Naapuri
programme.desc: Teräväpiirtokuvalla ja bonusmateriaaleilla varustettu Emile Hirschin, Elisha Cuthbertin ja Timothy Olyphantin tähdittämä riehakas komedia on kuumempi kuin koskaan! High Schoolista juuri valmistuva luokan priimus, Matthew Kidman haluaa saada koulun päätökseen ilman teinihörhöilyjen aiheuttamia ongelmia. Valitettavasti, ongelma muuttaa naapuriin, eikä Matthew pysty vastustamaan kiusausta.

programme.title: Kidnapping Mr. Heineken
programme.desc: Sisäpiirin tarina olutmoguli Alfred "Freddy" Heinekenin sieppaajien suunnittelusta, toteutuksesta, rajuista jälkimainingeista ja lopullisesta tuhosta vuonna 1983, mikä johti suurimpiin koskaan maksettuihin lunnaisiin yksilöstä.

programme.title: Tangerine
programme.desc: Sin-Dee Rella on palannut kaduille oltuaan 28 päivää vankilassa. Hän on transnainen ja prostituoitu ja tapaa ystävänsä ja kollegansa Alexandran, joka kertoo hänelle, että Sin-Deen parittajapoikaystävällä oli suhde hänen poissa ollessaan. Sin-Dee näkee punaista, eikä Alexandra voi kuin lähteä mukaan petturimiestä metsästämään. Tangerine osui amerikkalaiseen indieskeneen kuin pommi, ja siitä alkoi Sean Bakerin (The Florida Project, Anora) arvostettu ohjaajanura.

programme.title: Cold War
programme.desc: Cold War on intohimoinen rakkaustarina miehestä ja naisesta, Wiktorista ja Zulasta, jotka tapaavat toisensa sotienjälkeisen Puolan raunioissa. Nämä kaksi täysin erilaisen taustan ja mielenlaadun omaavaa ihmistä ovat toistensa täydelliset vastakohdat, ja silti auttamattomasti tuomittuja kuulumaan toisilleen. 1950-luvun kylmän sodan aikaiseen Puolaan, Berliiniin, Jugoslaviaan ja Pariisiin sijoittuvassa tarinassa pariskunnan erottavat toisistaan poliittiset käänteet, tuliset luonteet ja onnettomat kohtalon oikut - mahdoton rakkaustarina mahdottomana aikana.

programme.title: Viides Valta
programme.desc: He perustivat vallanpitäjiä hätyyttävän nettisivun ja heistä tuli maailman jahdatuimpia ihmisiä. WikiLeaksin perustajat Julian Assange ja Daniel Domscheit-Berg saivat haltuunsa kaikkien aikojen suurimman määrän luottamuksellisia ja vuodettuja tietoja Yhdysvaltain puolustusministeriöstä. Silloin käynnistyi sisäinen taistelu. Paljonko kannattaa maksaa vapaan maailman suurimmista salaisuuksista? Mitä niiden paljastaminen maksaa?Daniel Domscheit-Bergin oma kirja WikiLeaksista on pohjana aidolle trillerille, joka kertoo aikamme keskustelluimmasta ja ristiriitaisimmasta organisaatiosta WikiLeaksista ja sen perustajasta Julian Assangesta.

programme.title: The Spy Next Door
programme.desc: Bob Ho on kansainvälinen agentti, joka on ollut mukana vaikka missä: takaa-ajoissa, räjähdyksissä, putoamisissa. Ne eivät kuitenkaan ole mitään verrattuna hänenseuraavaan tehtäväänsä: hänen pitää hoitaa tyttöystävänsä kolmea kakaraa! Jo aamiainen ja koulumaksujen hoitaminen ovat rankkoja tehtäviä, mutta kun yksi lapsista suututtaa venäläisen terroristin, viikonloppu saa aivan uudenlaisen käänteen.Jackie Chaniin ei väsy koskaan eikä Jackie Chan ole koskaan liian vanha näyttämään taistelulajiosaamistaan tai tekemään vaarallisia stuntteja, sillä jälleen kerran hänellä on vastassaan vihollisia: pieniä lapsukaisia!

programme.title: The Mothman Prophecies
programme.desc: Journalisti John Klein ja hänen vaimonsa Mary joutuvat kohtalokkaaseen onnettomuuteen. Vaimon kuoleman jälkeen Johnin pakkomielteeksi muodostuvat Maryn sairaalassa tekemät luonnokset, jotka kuvaavat tummaa, siivekästä hahmoa. Pari vuotta myöhemmin eräällä juttumatkallaan John ajaa selittämättömällä tavalla muutamassa tunnissa satoja maileja ja joutuu Point Pleasantin pikkukaupunkiin. Poliisi Connie Parker kertoo seudulla sattuneista havainnoista: yöperhosmainen punasilmäinen olio on ilmestynyt useille paikkakuntalaisille...

programme.title: The Gift
programme.desc: Nuori pari Simon (Bateman) ja Robyn (Hall) törmäävät sattumalta kaupassa Simonin vanhaan ja miltei unohdettuun tuttavaan, erikoislaatuiseen Gordoon (Edgerton). Miehen yltyvä kiinnostus pariskuntaa kohtaan, mystiset lahjalähetykset ja lopulta synkkä paljastus Simonin menneisyydestä riuhtaisee heidän seesteisen elämänsä kammottavaan syöksykierteeseen.

programme.title: Love The Coopers
programme.desc: Cooperien iso perhe kokoontuu viettämään joulua yhdessä, mutta perinteisiä kuvioita sotkevat yllätysvieraat.

programme.title: Before Midnight
programme.desc: Tapaamme Jessen ja Celinen lähes kaksi vuosikymmentä sen jälkeen, kun he tapasivat ensi kerran junassa matkalla Wieniin. Vuosien vierittyä he asuvat nyt yhdessä Pariisissa.
Nuoren kirjailijan on hyväksyttävä kuolevaisuutensa kun hänellä todetaan harvinainen syöpä.Parhaan ystävänsä ja empaattisen nuoren terapeutin avulla hän löytää rohkeuden taistella sairautta vastaan.

programme.title: Le Havre
programme.desc: Parhaan elokuvan Jussi-palkinnon voittaja ja myös kansainvälisesti palkittu elokuva, voitti myös 2011 Cannesin elokuvajuhlilla, elokuvakriitikkojen järjestön Fiprescin palkinnon, parhaan koiranäyttelijän sekä ekumeenisen tuomariston palkinnot. Le Havre kertoo kengänkiillottajasta, joka yrittää pelastaa pakolaislapsen.

programme.title: The Contract
programme.desc: Ray Keene (John Cusack), isä, joka haluaa lunastaa paikkansa poikansa (Jamie Anderson) silmissä, yrittää saada maailmanluokan salamurhaajan Cardenin (Morgan Freeman) oikeuden eteen. Samaan aikaan hänen on suojeltava poikaansa ja väisteltävä salamurhaajan tiimiä, joka metsästää heitä metodisesti erämaassa.

programme.title: Imaginary Heroes
programme.desc: Nokkela, herkullisen ivallinen tarina perheestä, jonka kulissit alkavat sortua vakavan tragedian seurauksena. Perheen nuorin poika hautoo kipeää salaisuutta kuin pahan unen vankina. Äiti laukoo sarkastisia ajatuksia ja hukuttaa tuskansa pulloon ja naapurin yksinhuoltajaan. Katkeransuolaista huumoria, lämpöä, rakkautta ja kaikkea siltä väliltä.

programme.title: The Hunting Party
programme.desc: Toimittajat matkustavat sotaisaan Bosniaan napatakseen sotarikollisen, mutta heitä luullaan CIA

programme.title: Majava
programme.desc: Majavasta voi olla apua sinullekin! Walter Blackin huumori on yhtä mustaa kuin hänen sukunimensä. Töissä menee huonosti, vaimo on saanut tarpeekseen ja poika vihaa isäänsä. Masennuksen syövereissä - ja kesken itsetuhoisen ryyppyputken - Walter löytää roskasäiliöstä nuhruisen käsinuken. Majavan. Kangasnukke kädessään Walter voi jälleen puhua vapaasti. Ja vieläpä brittiaksentilla! Mutta samalla kun Walter löytää itsensä uudelleen, uusi majavapersoona saa hänestä yliotteen! Kaksinkertaiset Oscar-voittajat Mel Gibson ja Jodie Foster ovat tehneet palkitun käsikirjoituksen avulla yhden vuoden omaperäisimmistä elokuvahelmistä.

programme.title: While We're Young
programme.desc: Josh (Ben Stiller) ja Cornelia (Naomi Watts) ovat onnellisesti naimisissa. Perheen perustaminen jäi heiltä onnistumatta, mutta se ei heitä vaivaa. Tuskaillessaan uuden dokumenttielokuvansa valmistumisen parissa Joshista alkaa kuitenkin tuntua, että elämästä puuttuu jotain. Kuvaan astuu kaksi uutta tuttavuutta, huoleton nuoripari Jamie ja Darby. Nämä vapaat sielut ovat milloin tahansa valmiita heittäytymään uuden kiinnostavan harrastuksen pariin, uppoutumaan retro-lautapeleihin tai hankkimaan lemmikkikanan. He avaavat Joshille oven menetettyyn nuoruuteen - tai ainakin siihen mitä hänen nuoruutensa olisi voinut olla.

programme.title: I Survived...
programme.desc: A 15-year-old is snatched off the street on an early morning run.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Joe hires Duane Hicks to help Buffalo navigate the future and coach Mikey; a DC-3 delivery mission goes awry when blizzard conditions and a broken oil cooler force an emergency landing.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Buffalo gets into the stunt flying business when veteran pilot Arnie flies the DC-4 for the re- enactment scene of a famous WWII bombing raid.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Critical of the many stops and starts in the Electra program, and frustrated with the constant drama at Buffalo, Chuck quits.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Frustrated with her lack of flying and stuck in a rut as a courier driver, Audrey decides her time at Buffalo is over.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: When a ferry breakdown causes a gasoline shortage in Yellowknife, new manager Duane begs Chuck to return and prepare the Electra for a fuel haul.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Duane lands a huge contract for the Electra and puts enormous pressure on mechanic Adam to prep the plane without the help of his mentor Chuck.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: The Electra flies to Alert, the northernmost settlement on Earth, forcing Adam and new senior manager Duane to work things out.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Sparks fly when Joe discovers Gord has taken a job with a rival airline after completing expensive training on one of the Buffalo planes.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Trying to make his mark at Buffalo, Duane lands two more Electra contracts.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Duane's decision to leave the Electra crew unsupervised while he spends time at home jeopardizes the completion of a major contract, and could cost him his job.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Engine troubles on the C-46 during the valley run force Devan to shut down an engine.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Engine troubles on the C-46 during the valley run force Devan to shut down an engine.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Rookie waterbomber pilot Scott gets his first taste of action when Buffalo responds to an emergency callout to fight fires in Alberta.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: When Yellowknife and the northern aviation community are rocked by three crashes in the space of a month, Joe places an extra emphasis on safety.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Joe receives a negative visit from Transport Canada when inspectors threaten to shut down the airline.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Weighed down by the responsibility of training a new rampie, and struggling to get out of Joe's doghouse, DC-3 co-pilot Tyler gets a once in a lifetime opportunity to stunt fly in his Cessna 150 for a visiting film crew.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: After taking command of an intense airlift, and dealing with the ugliest Electra load he's ever seen, Scott takes a scary fall on the icy tarmac.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: A week before Christmas, Buffalo agrees to lend a hand to an RCMP initiative to fly toys to isolated communities in the north.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Just months from retiring, Electra captain Ray Weber leads his crew on a multi-trip mission that requires landing on a rough ice strip on a remote lake.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: When South Korean buyers come to Buffalo to look at a water bomber, the pressure is on mechanic Cory to get the plane ready.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Justin and Cory attempt to place a Canadair CL-215 aircraft onto a cargo ship for delivery to a Korean company.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: In South Korea, Cory and Justin meet the ship delivering Buffalo's water bomber plane to new buyers there.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: As spring arrives and Ray's retirement day approaches, Sean surprises everyone by leaving Buffalo for a job with the competition.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Greenland's Narsarsuaq airport - known as one the world's most dangerous approaches - looms on the horizon as Cory and Justin begin a trans-global journey to deliver two CL-215 water bombers to Turkey.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Joe and Mikey hire a helicopter for a salvage mission to retrieve the rare tailpiece from a Lockheed 10-A that crashed in the Yellowknife woods forty years ago.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Justin and Cory are stranded in Croatia while trying to complete the delivery of two CL-215 water bombers to Turkey.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Mikey links up with Chris Hadfield aboard the International Space Station. Problems mount while trying to get a frozen DC-4 airborne.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Rookie co-pilot David faces a remote Arctic airstrip with sketchy landing gear. Mikey drafts a Buffalo hockey team to face off against an NHL squad in a charity shootout. Chuck gets a chance to shine on the ice.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Joe races a quirky antique snowmobile - with an airplane engine and no brakes. The water bomber crew struggles to get two planes out of Turkey. Cocky rampie Chris Staples tries to prove himself in the C-46.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: A cold snap triggers massive challenges. Devan runs into gear problems while he ferries a mothballed DC-3 across the country. And Justin has to make a snap decision with his newborn son aboard his plane.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: The Electra returns from repairs and the crew takes it right back to the ice strip that it set off from before the crash landing last year. Tyler works up the courage to confront Joe about a big decision. A hotshot Australian pilot tries to earn a job.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Facing Joe's wrath, Rod and Cory head to the UK to make urgent water bomber repairs. David tries to prove himself to Devan in the C-46 but ends up infuriating Devan. Will makes an ultimatum in Hay River.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Mikey trains for High Arctic survival with the Canadian Rangers. The Air Force invades Chuck's hangar. Joe faces tough competition at a California plane auction.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: AJ and James battle a DC-4 engine fire. It's Joe's 69th birthday - and he's never flown a helicopter before, so Mikey plans a special gift of chopper flight lessons.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Cory, Chuck and Brian watch as a 5,000-pound power unit smash to the ground, denting the Electra and putting it out of commission. Mikey scrambles to manage the crisis while Joe races to England to try and purchase a backup Electra.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Co-pilot Graeme's fumbles his Electra training landings. Chris stresses over his C-46 check ride. Adam rescues a stranded C-46.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Joe and Mikey head to England to bring home a new plane. Devan does target-practice in the DC-4.James builds a Buffalo-style soapbox racer.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Joe flies with the Snowbirds during the Hamilton air show and later teaches Mikey to fly. A surprise departure shakes up Buffalo.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Ice Pilots NWT celebrates a milestone with a look back at the last five years, a peek behind the camera and reflections from the Buffalo crew.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: An engine fire and series of mechanical gremlins has Buffalo scrambling to make its Christmas deliveries. Newest rampie Prefkar Mony struggles with life in the North.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Buffalo's Electra aircraft is hammered by rough winds up the Mackenzie Valley. In Hay River, a rookie crew faces the worst ice storm in years and one rampie has a tough go trying to fit in at Buffalo.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Engine trouble plagues Buffalo's newest Electra, ZFE, and a standoff between Joe and Transport Canada threatens to close the airline. At the same time, Joe faces a tough decision about his old dog Sophie.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Joe leaves to undergo medical tests at the Mayo Clinic in Phoenix, Arizona. Jeff and Sam stress over their DC-3 checkflights and Joe celebrates turning 70-his way.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Rookie pilot Jeff nearly runs off the runway. Prefkar learns to play hockey but drops the ball at Buffalo and Joe goes on a date with a real dog.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Mikey decides to get Buffalo involved in a D-Day paratrooper jump to commemorate the 70th anniversary of D-Day.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Buffalo's top guns, rookies and vets, go to California for aerial dogfights in real fighter planes. Cory and Mikey race to get ready for the D-Day jump.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Mikey's much-planned D-Day tribute parachute jump with 20 paratroopers hits a wall when Joe refuses to fly his DC-3 to the drop zone.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Rookie co-pilot Scott faces his worst nightmare when a faltering Curtiss C-46 Commando engine and low fog force a scary landing.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Christmas is just around the corner, but Buffalo's crucial food and mail runs come to a halt.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: A string of bad luck turns chief pilot Arnie's 66th birthday run into the flight from hell - and threatens to spoil his naughty birthday surprise.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Mechanic Cory races against the clock to turn two short-haul waterbombers into transatlantic aircraft for the epic journey to Turkey.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Mechanic Cory races against the clock to turn two short-haul waterbombers into transatlantic aircraft for the epic journey to Turkey.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: A charter flight falls through the cracks after the McBryans attend a wild family wedding, and an irate Joe pulls captain Justin from the Turkey test flights to do the job.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: A furious Joe fights against a federal suspension that will prevent him from carrying passengers for the first time in 20 years.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: AJ and Candace get married in the Ice Castle. A frustrated Chuck tries to get the Electra to pay her way. A flummoxed Mikey tries to bake a cake for Joe's birthday.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: The Turkey crew makes the critical jump over the North Atlantic. But en route to Portugal, one crew is forced to turn back.

programme.title: Fight to Survive S1 -

programme.title: The Trail S1 -
programme.desc: Stocked up on food, Laramy and 7 thrive at their new location. Laramy focuses on building some amenities to make life easier on The Trail.

programme.title: The Urban Huntsman S1 -

programme.desc: It's summer time in Alaska so Tom and Kia are making the most of the twenty-four hours of daylight.

programme.title: Gold Fever S1 -

programme.title: Emergency S1 -
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 New Year In The Emergency Room
programme.desc: Tet, the Vietnamese New Year, is pivotal in Vietnam. Yet, for paramedics, it's a bustling time. Similarly, in Sydney, New Year's is famous, but New South Wales Ambulance paramedics have little time for festivities.

programme.title: Emergency S1 -
programme.desc: Since 1991, Mumbai’s population has doubled, with over half living in slums. Buenos Aires faces similar struggles, where 7.6% reside in shantytowns. Paramedics often can’t reach these areas and must rely on local volunteers.

programme.title: Emergency S1 -
programme.desc: Thailand’s roads are among the deadliest in the world, with 24,000 deaths in 2016—73% of them motorcyclists. In Bangkok, paramedics remain constantly vigilant. Meanwhile, in Benin, daily fatal accidents keep Cotonou’s firefighters busy with medical evacuations.

programme.title: Dropped S7 -
programme.desc: With base camp set up and the cold setting in, Chris and Casey must find food…fast. Their energy levels are depleting as they begin their hunt for moose. As time ticks on, the brothers must think on their feet to find food…or risk going hungry.

programme.title: Survival Science S1 -
programme.desc: Military snipers are trained in a variety of skills: detection, stalking, camouflage, infiltration, special reconnaissance and target acquisition. Bottom line, a ton of cool shooting and science for Nick and Laura to explore!

programme.title: Survival Science S1 -
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Surviving a Lightning Strike
programme.desc: Laura and Nick travel to a state-of-the-art Direct Effects Lightning Test Lab. With some “explosive” experiments, they’ll determine the power lightning and how it behaves? And they’ll find out how can hunters and fishermen best protect themselves?

programme.desc: Struggling down slick Norwegian slopes with 65 pounds of gear, an exhausted Les Stroud fights through his most difficult ten-day mission yet.

programme.title: Dropped S7 -

programme.title: Dropped S7 -
programme.desc: The lack of hunting opportunities have drained Chris and Casey’s patience. Arguments ensue when they disagree over staying put, or portaging to a new lake. Signs of a bear remind the brothers that they must remain focused in order to stay alive.

programme.title: Dropped S7 -
programme.desc: Symptoms of starvation have set in for Chris and Casey, who haven’t eaten in days. When they cross paths with a grouse, the unexpected happens. Frustration peaks as the temperatures drop. The brothers set up a new camp, but will it help the hunt?

programme.title: Food Unknown S1 -
programme.desc: It’s the birthplace of Halloween, but the ghosts and ghouls which have canvassed the world have not scared up much interest in Irish cuisine. Mounting a classic motorcycle Jonathan tours a land of mystic traditions, boisterous locals, and iconic scenery. The world’s most magnetic pub culture draws him in, border conflict pushes him out, and dark legends pull him around. It’s an adventure soaked in rain, lore, and the food of ancestor’s past.

programme.title: Food Unknown S1 -
programme.desc: Jonathan faces his toughest challenge yet as he enters a country that has been coming to grips in defining and understanding their own cuisine. Through the historical turmoil and harsh climate, Russia has lost it’s traditional way of cooking, and eating. But the country is reviving this culture; Jonathan ventures the far stretches of the country to learn about modern cooks, as well as ancient kitchens housing the one key tool that gave birth to true Russian cuisine, the Russian oven. He’ll learn their insights, understand their efforts, and work with traditional Russian ingredients to learn what the cuisine used to be, and where it’s headed today.

programme.title: Epic Exploring S2 -
programme.desc: Cody is in Marrakech, Morocco, for a local exploring adventure on BMX-bikes through an old medina, along graffiti walls, night markets and a forbidden hotel.

In Reno, NV a former marine is taken in to custody for domestic abuse.

In Las Vegas, LV a daring inmate attempts to make a break for it while the supervising officers attend to a disturbance.

programme.title: Jail

programme.title: Jail
